personas.name: Frequent Activity Tracker
personas.description: A user who relies on the app to log workouts frequently and expects stable performance.
context: Using the app during outdoor exercise

personas.name: Locked-Out Linda
personas.description: A loyal, paying subscriber who is currently unable to access the service due to technical authentication errors.
pain_points: App fails to recognize active paid status
context: Attempting to use the app for stress management during work hours
Trying to restore access after an app update or re-install
constraints: Login must be functional 100% of the time

personas.name: Budget-Conscious Ben
personas.description: A student user looking for mental health support who feels excluded by the high cost and aggressive monetization.
goals: Avoid accidental or deceptive subscription charges
pain_points: Too much content locked behind a paywall
context: Searching for anxiety relief tools with zero budget
Evaluating the app during a short free trial period
constraints: Free content must be clearly labeled
Subscription costs should be transparent and affordable

personas.name: Sleepless Sarah
personas.description: A user with chronic sleep issues who relies on the app's stability to maintain rest through the night.
goals: Listen to uninterrupted sleep audio for 8 hours
Use downloaded content without an internet connection
pain_points: Audio stops unexpectedly in the middle of the night
context: Using the app in a dark room with low connectivity
Depending on the app as a sleep aid while traveling
constraints: Playback must not be interrupted by OS background limits
Offline mode must work without pinging a server

personas.name: Minimalist Mark
personas.description: A long-time veteran user who is frustrated by the increasing complexity and clutter of the app's design.
goals: Navigate to basic meditation tools quickly
Reduce visual noise and distractions within the UI
context: Trying to find a quick breathing exercise during a moment of panic
Using the app daily for years and seeing it become more complex
constraints: Interface should prioritize calm over promotion

personas.name: Zen Zoe
personas.description: A highly satisfied user who views the app as an essential, life-changing tool for daily mental health.
goals: Explore new content that supports a positive mindset
pain_points: Fear of bugs disrupting a critical health routine
Concern over losing access to favorite guided voices
context: Starting every morning with a 10-minute guided session
Recommending the app to friends and family as a 'must-have'
constraints: System reliability must protect the user's daily 'streak'
Content quality must remain consistently high
